title: Crunching the Numbers
quote: “I have been crunching the numbers and you don’t need to be a mathematician to see the odds are stacked against me in this moto. That’s the way I like it” - 10,000 hours
prompt: Did those reflections ever cross your mind on the gate? How did your numbers stack up there?
notes: The page text supplied no artist or song label. The visible embed identifies NF’s “When I Grow Up.”
